name: Cranberry-Apple Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a 9 x 13 inch pan placed in the preheated oven until hot.
3. In a mixing bowl, whisk together Bisquick, sugar, and milk until smooth.
4. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
5. Mix the cranberry sauce and applesauce with a fork or spoon until combined.
6. Spoon the mixture evenly over the batter in the pan.
7. Arrange apple slices on top of the sauce.
8. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream, rum raisin ice cream, or vanilla ice cream, if desired.
